mapper.select: /* noticeVO */ SELECT ROWNUM AS RM , NOTICE_NO , EMP_NO , NOTICE_TITLE , NOTICE_CONT , NOTICE_DT , NOTICE_VIEWS , ATCH_FILE_CD FROM NOTICE_BOARD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE_BOARD (NOTICE_NO, EMP_NO, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONT, NOTICE_DT, NOTICE_VIEWS, ATCH_FILE_CD) VALUES (NOTICE_BOARD_SEQ.nextval, 'test4', #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeCont}, SYSDATE, 0, #{atchFileCd})
